UpperNotes contribution guidelines
===================================

UpperNotes is a small personal fork of [Safe Notes](https://github.com/keshav-space/safenotes). Contributions are welcome, but the scope is intentionally narrow — this repo exists to maintain a handful of behavioral patches on top of upstream, not to grow into a separate product.

## Issues

* Check [existing issues](https://github.com/SifMuna/UpperNotes/issues) before opening a new one.
* If the issue also affects upstream Safe Notes, consider reporting it there.

## Pull requests

* Open an issue first to discuss non-trivial changes.
* Keep PRs focused on one fix or feature.
* Test your changes before submitting (compile and run on a device or emulator).
* Use a descriptive branch name and commit messages.

## Communication

Open a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/SifMuna/UpperNotes/discussions) or comment on a relevant issue.
